case_title: IRMA SANTANA VS. COSTCO WHOLESALE CORPORATION et al*****CASE TRANSFERRED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY*****

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF MOTION TO TRANSFER ACTION TO SAN MATEO COUNT FILED BY DEFENDANT COSTCO WHOLESALE CORPORATION HEARING SET FOR DEC-20-2013 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAR-12-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR TRANSFERRED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY SUPERIOR COURT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IN SUPPORT OF MOTION
COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR FILED BY DEFENDANT COSTCO WHOLESALE CORPORATION
ORDER TO TRANSFER CASE TO SAN MATEO COUNTY
MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-20-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT COSTCO WHOLESALE CORPORATION'S MOTION TO TRANSFER ACTION TO SAN MATEO COUNTY IS GRANTED. PURSUANT TO THE STIPULATION BETWEEN THE PARTIES, THE MATTER IS TRANSFERRED TO THE SAN MATEO COUNTY SUPERIOR COURT. THE CLERK SHALL TRANSFER THE MATTER TO SAN MATEO COUNTY UPON PAYMENT OF THE TRANSFER FEES. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, COURT REPORTER: TONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-24-2014 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion To Transfer Action To San Mateo Count
Off Calendar Dec-20-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT COSTCO WHOLESALE CORPORATION'S Motion To Transfer Action To San Mateo County IS Granted. Pursuant to the stipulation between the parties, the matter is transferred to the San Mateo County Superior Court. The clerk shall transfer the matter to San Mateo County upon payment of the transfer fees. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Tony Vaughn, CSR #6185
